today.heading: What color are you today?
today.subheading: Reflect your mood with the sliders and tags below.

upgradeModal.title: Unlock more with hueday+ 👑
upgradeModal.subtitle: Discover the most beautiful way to express yourself in color.
upgradeModal.benefit1Desc: Access Y2K Chrome, Watercolor, and Night Neon styles.
upgradeModal.benefit2Desc: Create lock screen and home screen wallpapers from today's card.
upgradeModal.benefit3Desc: Catch similar moods with your friends on the same day.

moodCalendar.heading: Mood Calendar
moodCalendar.subheading: Tap a day to mark its color mood.
moodCalendar.modalSubtitle: Pick today's color, long-press to adjust its intensity.

studio.heading: Artist Studio
studio.subheading: Explore color themes shared by designers, apply them to today's card with one tap.
studio.appliedHint: ✨ Applied to today's card — you can see it in the "Today" and "Calendar" tabs.

album.title: Collection & Time 🏆
album.emptyCategory: No cards or upcoming events in this category yet.
album.capsuleEmptyDesc: Write your private thoughts on a day card and seal it for a year from now. Create a ceremonial surprise that opens exactly 365 days later.
album.capsuleEmptyButton: + Seal a Note to Today's Card

chatsList.heading: Vibe Chat
chatsList.subheading: Share your daily colors and vibes with your friends.
chatsList.noMessages: No messages yet. Send the first one!

card.sameVibeBanner: 💫 You're on the Same Vibe as Deniz! See the Match
card.addRitualButton: + Pick a Stone & Start the Day 🔮
card.emptyFutureDesc: This day's color will form once it arrives. For now, you can plan agenda tasks and notes for it.
card.emptyPastDesc: You haven't logged a mood for today yet. You can go back to the home screen anytime to create your color.
card.emptyAgenda: No tasks added for this day yet. Take a small step!
card.noteAreaPlaceholder: To-dos, thoughts, or a special agenda note for this day...

wallpaperUpgradeModal.title: Unlock the Wallpaper Set
wallpaperUpgradeModal.subtitle: Generate a high-resolution lock screen wallpaper set derived from today's color tones.

motivationalQuotes: Your light stays with you even in the darkest moment.
Every day is a new canvas.
Your potential is as endless as your colors.
You find your own color in the silence.

wrapped.title: hueday wrapped
wrapped.subtitle: Your story, woven in color.
wrapped.notEnoughDataForWave: At least 2 days must be logged to draw the wave.
wrapped.emptyMonthText: No day cards logged for this month yet.

settings.premiumMemberDesc: Enjoy your premium features! All card styles, Wallpaper Set, and more are unlocked.
settings.premiumUpgradeDesc: Unlock all card styles (Y2K Chrome, Watercolor, Neon), the Wallpaper Set, Widget, and Hue Blend features.
settings.dailyReminderDesc: Asks about today's color at 9:00 PM.

resetModal.title: Reset Data ⚠️
resetModal.warning: All your past day cards will be deleted. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?

openingCeremony.noteFromLastYear: You Have a Note From This Day Last Year
openingCeremony.saidLastYear: A Year Ago, You Told Yourself:
openingCeremony.notChosenYet: You haven't picked today's color yet 🌱
openingCeremony.writeReplyButton: Write a Reply to Last Year's You 📝
openingCeremony.whatToSayToLastYear: What Would You Say to Last Year's You?
openingCeremony.replyBecomesCapsule: Your reply will be sealed as a new time capsule for next year.
openingCeremony.replyPlaceholder: Write a reply to your future or past self...

crystal.chooseStoneTitle: Choose Your Stone and Set Your Intention
crystal.intentPlaceholder: What do you intend for today?
crystal.sealMonthDesc: Your intention is kept until the end of the month and shown at the wrap-up.

sealingRitual.title: A Note to Your Past or Future Self 📜
sealingRitual.warning: ⚠️ This note won't be readable by anyone — including you — for a year. It will open exactly 365 days from today.
sealingRitual.notePlaceholder: What would you like to tell yourself a year from now? Write your thoughts, feelings, and hopes...

astronomy.springEquinoxDesc: The day night and day are equal, and nature awakens.
astronomy.summerSolsticeDesc: The longest day of the year, when the sun is at its peak.
astronomy.autumnEquinoxDesc: Night and day balance again — a time to slow down.
astronomy.winterSolsticeDesc: The longest night of the year, the rebirth of light.
astronomy.newYearDesc: A new page opens on the calendar.
astronomy.yearEndTitle: The Last Day of the Year 🥂
astronomy.yearEndDesc: A day to celebrate the whole year's colors.
astronomy.fullMoonDesc: The moon at its brightest and fullest in the sky.
astronomy.newMoonDesc: A dark sky — a fresh start for new intentions.

meteorShower.desc: The sky is full of shooting stars tonight.

specialEvents.birthdayDesc: Today is your special day — celebrate yourself!
specialEvents.anniversaryDesc: It's the {{years}}-year anniversary of joining Hueday.
specialEvents.milestone100Desc: You've logged your color for 100 days!
specialEvents.milestone365Desc: You've logged your color every day for a full year!

weather.firstSnowDesc: The season's first snow fell on your city!

notifications.dailyReminderBody: Log your mood in 10 seconds, generate your day card.

chats.deniz1: What color are you today? I'm in green tones 🌿
chats.deniz2: I'm feeling some calm blue-green tones today too!
chats.deniz3: Awesome! Looks like we caught a vibe match ✨
chats.elif1: Today's Y2K Chrome card came out amazing!

replies: What an amazing color choice! Calm tones suit you so well. 🌿
I felt really calm today too, our colors are basically saying it.
I think these tones reflect the balance in your inner world. 💫
Did you share today's card as a story? The design is great!
Ooo amazing! 💫 I love the color transitions in this palette!
Guess we're on the same vibe today! We're literally glowing 🥳
Your colors always inspire me so much!
Let's take this energy outside and share it!
This color combination came out so artistic. I could use these hex codes in my designs! 🎨
Did you try the new card styles? Y2K Chrome is definitely my favorite!
I'm thinking of printing the year-end color tapestry and hanging it as a poster ✨
The arrangement of colors in the calendar is so symmetrical, it brings me peace just looking at it.

ametist.name: Amethyst
ametist.tagline: Amethyst — A day of mental clarity and inner peace
affirmations: I calm my mind and trust my own rhythm.
My thoughts are clear and lucid.
Today I protect my inner peace.

gul-kuvarsi.name: Rose Quartz
gul-kuvarsi.tagline: Rose quartz — A day of self-compassion
affirmations: Today I choose to be gentle with myself.
I open my heart with compassion and love.
I am enough just as I am.

sitrin.name: Citrine
sitrin.tagline: Citrine — Intentions of joy and abundance
affirmations: I feel the sun's joy within me.
I notice the abundance in small moments.
Today I multiply my reasons to smile.

ay-tasi.name: Moonstone
ay-tasi.tagline: Moonstone — A day of intuition and renewal
affirmations: I make room for my inner intuition.
I welcome change with grace.
I allow my emotions to flow.

obsidyen.name: Obsidian
obsidyen.tagline: Obsidian — A day of protecting your boundaries
affirmations: I protect my own space with love.
I see saying no as an act of self-respect.
I complete the day centered in myself.

akuamarin.name: Aquamarine
akuamarin.tagline: Aquamarine — A day of ease and expression
affirmations: I express what I feel freely and calmly.
I am as easy and flexible as water.
I refresh my mind with an easy breath.

kaplan-gozu.name: Tiger's Eye
kaplan-gozu.tagline: Tiger's eye — A day of courage and focus
affirmations: I trust my decisions and my steps.
Today I stay focused on my goal.
I face challenges with courage.

yesim.name: Jade
yesim.tagline: Jade — A day of balance and renewal
affirmations: I invite nature's balance into my life.
I am refreshing and renewing.
Every moment is a new beginning.

toskana-gunbatimi.description: A warm, dusty, slowing evening light.

neo-tokyo-gece.description: Neon-wet asphalt and the city's electric pulse.

cam-goletler.description: A clear, calm, deep breath of mountain air.

safran-pazari.description: Spice-scented streets and a lively crowd.

lavanta-alacakaranlik.description: A soft, thoughtful silence in the day's last light.

mercan-resif.description: A vivid, playful, energetic riot of underwater color.

kagit-ve-murekkep.description: A minimal, paper-textured day of few words.

cumak-ormanlari.description: The scent of damp earth and a rooted stillness.

gece-yarisi-neonu.description: The electric, bold spirit of sleepless cities.
